title: cyathea subarachnoidea
intro: Cyathea subarachnoidea, also known as the fern tree, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cyatheaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, asthma, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Cyathea subarachnoidea typically include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
